        "spotlight": "Mehmas colt who was foaled in March and cost 40,000euros as a yearling; tenth foal; half-brother to winners Moonlight In Paris (1m/8.6f; RPR 103), Malayan (7f 2yo; 87), Maison De York (6f-1m; 86) and Autumn Rose (multiple 7f; 71); dam 1m1f/9.4f winner (94); trainer had a well-touted newcomer collect at the first time of asking on the AW last week; interesting under Oisin Murphy."

        "spotlight": "January foal; \u00a355,000 yearling by Persian Force who won the Brocklesby on debut for this yard; third foal; dam unraced half-sister to winners Theophilos (1m4f Flat/2m hurdle), Tabernas (UAE 6f/Oman 1m2f) and She's All In Gold (2m3f hurdle); trainer's 2yos already off the mark and he won this in 2023 and 2024, and had the close runner-up 12 months ago; of obvious interest."

        "spotlight": "March foal; 68,000gns yearling; ninth foal; closely related to winners Pentle Bay (Listed-placed 6f 2yo; RPR 87) and Japarana (French 1m3f/12.5f) and half-brother to four winners including Berkshire Boom (7f 2yo; 72); dam French 1m4f winner; hard to know what his trip will be but stable's only 2yo runner this season was a winner."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "April foal by Kodiac; 140,000gns yearling; fourth foal; half-brother to US 1m turf winner Vina Arana (RPR 102); dam Greek 6.5f winner, half-sister to winners Path Of Thunder (Listed-placed 7f/1m) and Excellent Sunset (US Graded stakes-placed 1m); first 2yo runner of the season from a yard that does well in early juvenile races (won this last year)."

      {
        "rank": 1,

        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-15.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Hold-up performer who won at Lingfield (6f, Polytrack) for Martin Dunne last summer and he got back near that level when a close second at Kempton (eyeshield added) last week; that was only his second run for Adam Kirby and he should get a good tow into this race; interesting contender off same mark as last time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Good Karma",
        "jockey": "Ethan Tindall(5)",
        "trainer": "John David Riches",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "-55327",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "More Than Ready",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "18.1%",
        "fair_odds": "5.54",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Went close here (7f) on his penultimate run but he's not easy to predict and was well held when favourite at Thirsk (7f, good) last Friday; needs to step up again after that and all of his three wins have been over 7f; first-time visor."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Twilight Madness",
        "jockey": "Alistair Rawlinson",
        "trainer": "Simon Hodgson",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "932319",
        "sire": "Twilight Son",
        "dam_sire": "Rahy",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "52.9",
        "model_pct": "16.7%",
        "fair_odds": "5.99",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "+0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ten-time sprint winner who scored at Bath (5f, good) two weeks ago and the quick turnaround may have caused his downfall at Kempton three days later; has claims if he can recapture that penultimate form and his four runs over C&D include a win and two thirds; dangerous."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Due Date",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "Charlie Wallis",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "6-7807",
        "sire": "Due Diligence",
        "dam_sire": "Compton Place",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "50.1",
        "model_pct": "12.1%",
        "fair_odds": "8.28",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+7.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four wins in a purple patch in the second half of 2025; now 2lb lower than for his last success but he's struggled at big prices in four runs this year and needs to get back on track."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Jojo Rabbit",
        "jockey": "James Sullivan",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "077-81",
        "sire": "Due Diligence",
        "dam_sire": "Sakhee's Secret",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "48.8",
        "model_pct": "10.3%",
        "fair_odds": "9.67",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-6.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Returned to form when making all off a reduced mark at Pontefract (5f, good to soft) ten days ago; remains feasibly treated under a penalty and his four runs over this trip include a creditable third over C&D; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Punchbowl Flyer",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "John O'Shea",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "61",
        "form": "042443",
        "sire": "Dream Ahead",
        "dam_sire": "Red Clubs",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "47.8",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.90",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Series of creditable efforts this year and his front-running third over C&D last time was from a wide draw; should go well again off an unchanged mark but he's had only one win since June 2021."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Style King",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Chris Dwyer",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "7186-9",

        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "46.4",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.83",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made the breakthrough with a front-running win at Lingfield (6f, AW) in September but he's been disappointing since; may have needed his reappearance run last month but he's now 1-14 and this looks tough from a wide draw."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "fair_odds": "21.83",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-6.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Her last four wins have been at this track and latest was off 1lb lower over C&D last June; mixed results in three runs this year but she had traffic issues last time and was placed here (6f) on her penultimate run; in the mix."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Megaphone",
        "jockey": "Mikkel Mortensen(5)",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "72",

        "fair_odds": "39.42",
        "best_dec": "151.00",
        "edge": "+3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won twice on AW early last year but he's been regressive since and has finished ahead of only one rival in four runs for his current yard; mark continues to fall but he's now 0-13 in handicaps and slow starts have been a recurring theme; lots to prove."
      }
    ]

        "spotlight": "Promising debut here last September where he was green and looked stretched by 7f, losing four places in the final 110 yards; found improvement dropped to 6f when runner-up at Brighton the following month and he ended last season with another close call at Chelmsford in October; leading form contender on his return and he should have more to offer as a 3yo."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "62,000euros yearling; 11-1 with blinkers applied on Lingfield debut (7f, Polytrack) last month but he didn't get much luck before finishing well for third; that was eye-catching and he's a big player if he can build on that on this drop in trip."

        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "55,000gns yearling; Havana Grey half-brother to five winners; weak 9-1 shot at Chelmsford (6f, AW) last month but he ran well for a long way before finishing fourth behind an odds-on rival; was beaten 7l but he should benefit from that experience and is open to progress on his second start."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Market springer when runner-up on Kempton debut (6f, Polytrack) in November; failed to build on that over C&D five days later but he had a tough draw and that may have come too soon; looks interesting on his initial form and he's respected back from a break."

  {
    "course": "Newbury",
    "time": "15:07",
    "race_name": "Dreweatts Maiden Fillies' Stakes (GBB/GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Allaire (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2-",
        "sire": "Study Of Man",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "62.5",
        "model_pct": "12.8%",
        "fair_odds": "7.78",
        "best_dec": "2.88",
        "edge": "-22.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Half-sister to winners including Eldar Eldarov (1m-14.5f including St Leger; RPR 117) and Kingswood (1m1f/1m2f; 113); 7-2 from 17-2 for novice at Lingfield (1m, AW) in December and came from towards rear to be second of 11; looks sure to improve, with 1m2f a help."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "I'm The One",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Camelot",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.8",
        "model_pct": "11.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.03",
        "best_dec": "2.88",
        "edge": "-22.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "By Sea The Stars; first foal; dam German 1m2f/1m4f winner (including Group 1; RPR 112), half-sister to German 1m3f Listed winner, out of half-sister to German 1m3f Group 2 winner Simoun; Oaks entry from a top yard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Light Dreamer",
        "jockey": "Joe Leavy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2",
        "sire": "Lucky Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "55.7",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.25",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Half-sister to five winners, easily the best being Bolthole (1m-1m3f; RPR 116); weak 12-1 for seven-runner maiden at Kempton (7f, AW) 16 days ago but came from the back to go down by a neck; experienced winner (hot favourite) represented same connections as Allaire; improvement is almost certainly needed but that's the best form in this field and a bright start to career; yard also runs Semper Femina."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Wild Violet",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Zarak",
        "dam_sire": "No Nay Never",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "52.2",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.56",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "By Zarak; first foal; dam 7f AW 2yo winner (RPR 79) out of French 9.7f-winning half-sister to useful 6f 2yo/1m winner Ershaad, is granddaughter of Canadian 1m2f Grade 1 winner; late foal; another to check out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Tempestra",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Street Cry",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "52.0",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.68",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "360,000gns yearling by Sea The Stars; fourth foal; sister to winners Sea On Time (11.6f/1m4f; RPR 110), Sea Just In Time (1m2f 2yo/1m4f; 101) and Truthful (1m2f/11.6f; 100); dam unraced half-sister to 5f 2yo Listed winner, out of 1m2f Group 3 winner; blinkers are notable on debut but she needs a close look."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Semper Femina",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2",
        "sire": "Lucky Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Montjeu",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "50.9",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.56",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "80,000euros yearling by Lucky Vega, who's also the sire of stablemate Light Dreamer; well-backed second favourite for maiden at Kempton (1m3f, AW) 18 days ago when slowly into stride but coming from the rear to be second of eight; should build on that and the market moves should be interesting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Marianita",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "50.8",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.65",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "200,000gns yearling by Lope De Vega; sixth foal; sister to 10.6f AW winner Sacred Oath (RPR 80), half-sister to winners Expand The Map (US 1m turf) and Verdant Lady (French 12.5f AW); dam French 1m winner (109) out of French Group-placed 1m winner; powerful yard also runs Musical Accord."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Musical Accord",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "50.0",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.28",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "350,000gns yearling by Camelot; fifth foal; half-sister to winners Laneqash (7f/1m including Listed; RPR 115), Open Mind (6f/7f; 101), Miss Oxford (French 7f; 93) and Aysgarth (7f 2yo; 85); dam 8.6f AW winner (72); from a leading yard which also runs Marianita, so the market can give big clues."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Society Girl (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "47-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "46.7",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.25",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+3.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "33-1 at Yarmouth (1m, good to soft) in October and looked to be struggling for a long way, but she stayed on for an eye-catching fourth of ten; disappointing, however, when 9-2 at Newcastle (1m, AW) four weeks later."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Bintnaseefa",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "Harry Charlton",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "46.2",
        "model_pct": "5.3%",
        "fair_odds": "18.68",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+2.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "220,000gns yearling by Sea The Stars; third foal; half-sister to 7f winner Triumph Of Peace (RPR 83); dam 7f winner (including Listed; 102), half-sister to fairly useful winners, out of 5f 2yo Listed winner; market can guide, including as her stable also runs Take A View."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Eze Sur Mer (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Dr Richard Newland & Jamie Insole",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4-4",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "45.0",
        "model_pct": "5.0%",
        "fair_odds": "19.90",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Useful pedigree; fourth at Wolverhampton (9.4f, AW) in December and March but this race surely demands a lot more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Take A View",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Harry Charlton",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-2",

        "fair_odds": "19.97",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "By Sea The Stars; fifth foal; sister to 7f/1m2f 2yo winner One World (RPR 91), half-sister to winners Time Lock (1m4f including Group 3; 113) and Continuite (1m; 93); dam 1m-1m2f winner (96), sister to 1m/1m2f Group 2 winner Time Test; stable also runs Bintnaseefa and the market can probably guide."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,

        "ts": "-",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "120,000gns yearling by Bated Breath; first foal; dam 1m4f/13.5f winner (RPR 90) out of 1m Listed-winning half-sister to 2,000 Guineas winner Footstepsinthesand; 14-1, always mid-division when beaten 14l in maiden at Wolverhampton (9.4f, AW) in December; major work to do."
      },

      },

      }

  {
    "course": "Wolverhampton (AW)",
    "time": "15:18",
    "race_name": "Get The Inside Track With raceday-ready.com Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m6f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Solar Pass",
        "jockey": "Alfie Redman(7)",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "8227-1",
        "sire": "Phoenix Reach",
        "dam_sire": "Passing Glance",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "58.2",
        "model_pct": "32.9%",
        "fair_odds": "3.04",
        "best_dec": "2.38",
        "edge": "-15.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unexposed filly who has proved consistent on the AW (721421), doubling her tally with a game success at Southwell (1m4f, Tapeta) last month after 182 days off (third and fourth won next time); only 3lb higher and has run well over this far on turf; major player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Caramay",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Muir & Chris Grassick",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "-34133",
        "sire": "Lethal Force",
        "dam_sire": "Mount Nelson",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "56.3",
        "model_pct": "25.0%",
        "fair_odds": "4.00",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tough mare who has been in good form since December (1334133), the wins coming at Southwell (1m4f, Tapeta) and Kempton (1m3f, Polytrack); has never attempted this far before, but still respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Robusto",
        "jockey": "Harry Vigors(7)",
        "trainer": "Eve Johnson Houghton",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "-22630",
        "sire": "Churchill",
        "dam_sire": "More Than Ready",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "16.5%",
        "fair_odds": "6.06",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Losing run up to 18 and has to put a poor recent effort at Lingfield (1m4f, Polytrack) behind him, but he often makes the running and could enjoy the run of the race if again ridden positively; visor removed after one use."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Diamond Bay",
        "jockey": "Finley Marsh",
        "trainer": "Tom Ward",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "7243-0",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Dalakhani",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.0",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.50",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins here including over this trip, but he ran very poorly on his return from four months off at Lingfield (2m, Polytrack) a fortnight ago, especially as he proven fresh; visor returns."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Crackergee (GB)",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Hughie Morrison",

        "spotlight": "Has ability but has also proved wildly inconsistent and is now 0-9; probably best watched with tongue-tie removed on return from 130 days off."

        "rank": 6,

        "spotlight": "Three wins including an emphatic success at Southwell (1m6f, Tapeta) on his 4yo reappearance, but he has plenty to prove having been beaten a very long way on his return from almost 21 months off at Musselburgh (1m6f, soft) 13 days ago."
      }

  },

  {
    "course": "Newbury",
    "time": "15:42",
    "race_name": "Darley EBF Novice Stakes (GBB/GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Shabab Al Ahli (GB)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "68.2",
        "model_pct": "18.9%",
        "fair_odds": "5.30",
        "best_dec": "2.20",
        "edge": "-27.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dante and Derby entry; 500,000gns yearling; Frankel close relative of 1m3f-1m6f winner Klondike (Group 3; RPR 115) and a half-brother to Kemari (11.4f-1m6f Group 3; RPR 114); 8-15 for novice at Southwell (1m3f, AW) in February, in just a four-runner race but he left another Frankel colt just over 8l behind in second; looked green but with lots of scope, a good prospect."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Maltese Cross (FR)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "21-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Camelot",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "63.6",
        "model_pct": "15.1%",
        "fair_odds": "6.63",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-18.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dante and Derby entry; went close on debut at Ascot (1m, soft) and one better in a Newmarket maiden (1m, good) later in September; battled back admirably in the latter, which is strong form; looks a good prospect for 1m2f and probably even more so for 1m4f."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Alfaraz (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "22-",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Siyouni",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "61.6",
        "model_pct": "13.6%",
        "fair_odds": "7.34",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dante and Derby entry; 300,000gns yearling by Nathaniel; second as 2yo in small fields for a novice event at Goodwood (1m, good to firm) and conditions stakes at Epsom (8.5f, good); had no answers in the latter to a subsequent Listed winner but stuck to his task well and 1m2f+ will suit."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "My Love Is King (GB)",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "57.5",
        "model_pct": "11.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.96",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dante and Derby entry; brother to US 1m-1m5f winner Serve The King (including turf Grade 2; RPR 115), half-brother to three winners including Loving Things (1m2f-1m4f including Group 3; 109); 4-6 for five-runner novice at Newcastle (7f, AW) in November, running green but ending comfortably on top; fascinating, pitched into strong race for this second start."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Sahara King (GB)",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "56.1",
        "model_pct": "10.4%",
        "fair_odds": "9.61",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+7.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "16-1 for ten-runner novice at Wolverhampton (8.6f, AW) in November, but always prominent and led final strides from Ranga Tang who ran in the 1m2f Newmarket handicap on Wednesday; does not have the most striking pedigree for one in these colours but looks sure to stay 1m2f and improve."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Joulany (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "24-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.94",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-5.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Derby entry; 800,000gns Sea The Stars yearling, brother to multiple Group 3 winner Al Aasy (1m2f-1m5f); turned over at odds-on in a novice at Kempton (7f, AW) and maiden at York (1m, good) last autumn, with debut the better effort; hooded for reappearance; has plenty of ability and should win before long but others in this have not blotted their copybooks."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Much",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Authorized",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "47.3",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.80",
        "best_dec": "81.00",
        "edge": "+5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fifth foal; Frankel close relation to 11.6f/1m4f winner Flower Of Scotland (RPR 87), half-brother to winners Promissory (Group-placed 1m4f; 104) and Royal Scandal (1m2f/1m4f AW; 98); dam 1m3f-1m4f winner (including Group 1; 118); tongue tied for debut but it will be interesting to see his market strength."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Easwrith Destiny",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "David Menuisier",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Leading Light",
        "dam_sire": "Declaration Of War",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "42.6",
        "model_pct": "5.4%",
        "fair_odds": "18.65",
        "best_dec": "81.00",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "By Leading Light; first foal; dam pulled up in a bumper on her only start, half-sister to French 7f 2yo Group 3 winner Stefer, is granddaughter of US 1m3f Grade 3 winner; makes his debut in what should be an extremely hot race, so is probably best watched."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Ataturk (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Hughie Morrison",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "8-",
        "sire": "Golden Horn",
        "dam_sire": "Doyen",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "42.0",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.23",
        "best_dec": "201.00",
        "edge": "+5.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Golden Horn half-brother to the same connections' smart stayer Kyle Of Lochalsh; never dangerous at 50-1 for a novice here (1m, soft) in October and he's still likely to come into his own later and over further."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Barrister (GB)",
        "jockey": "Sam Hitchcott",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4-",
        "sire": "Without Parole",
        "dam_sire": "Motivator",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "41.7",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.46",
        "best_dec": "101.00",
        "edge": "+5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Derby entry by Without Parole; 14-1, close up long way when fourth of 12 in novice at Kempton (7f, AW) in October; should improve but pedigree and that performance are not nearly as striking as some in this race."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Wolverhampton (AW)",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "fair_odds": "2.71",
        "best_dec": "1.83",
        "edge": "-27.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record on the AW reads 1211 and he was impressive when making virtually all over 6f here eight days ago; 5lb penalty and return to 5f shouldn't preclude another big performance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Hunky Dory",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",
        "trainer": "Jack Morland",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "81",

        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "59.4",
        "model_pct": "19.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.22",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-12.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Southwell for Mick Appleby in December and he made it 2-4 in cheekpieces with a dominant display at Wolverhampton (6f, AW) last week; record of 0-7 on turf but he ran well in big-field handicap at York last summer and he's a major player if he can transfer his progress back to this sphere; respected under a penalty."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Alondra",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "3-1125",
        "sire": "Sergei Prokofiev",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "56.2",
        "model_pct": "12.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.21",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record over C&D in February read 112, but she seemed to be beaten fair and square back here last month; the handicapper may have her for the time being."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Counsel",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "814-71",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "55.3",
        "model_pct": "10.8%",
        "fair_odds": "9.26",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it 2-2 over C&D when scraping home last month; up 2lb, but that latest run came after 79 days off so he could be a bit sharper for it; high on list."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Havana Blast",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "3416/0",

        "dam_sire": "Showcasing",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "54.6",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.26",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-8.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced gelding whose sole win came at Chelmsford (5f, Polytrack; first-time tongue-tie) in August 2024; was entitled to need the run after 19 months off at Newcastle (5f, Tapeta) three weeks ago and a hood is now given a go, but others looks more solid."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Accrual",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "David Loughnane",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "86",

        "dam_sire": "Namid",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-10",

        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.72",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins and two runner-up finishes from five visits here, but not at his best in his recent completed starts; others make greater appeal."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Ziggy's Missile (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Neil Callan",
        "trainer": "Robert Cowell",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "95",

        "stall": 6,

        "fair_odds": "20.91",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not seen in six months, but finished first and second in two starts over C&D as a 3yo, on each occasion when returning from an absence; 6lb below last winning mark; worth a second look."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Bath",
    "time": "16:15",
    "race_name": "Blackmore Build And Design Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "2m1f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Educator (GB)",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Henrietta C Knight",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "5-5238",
        "sire": "Deep Impact",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "58.2",
        "model_pct": "29.6%",
        "fair_odds": "3.38",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "+3.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Triple turf winner who finished well to go close off this mark at Kempton (2m, AW) in January; flopped with a heavy defeat at Newcastle the following month but that was a Class 3 and has claims if he can bounce back after a short break; has form on good to firm and good to soft."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Man Of The Sea (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Myla Coppins(7)",
        "trainer": "Neil Mulholland",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "1/110-",
        "sire": "Born To Sea",
        "dam_sire": "Ali-Royal",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-6",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "21.8%",
        "fair_odds": "4.59",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has done a lot of his winning in Jersey but he scored here (1m5f, firm) in the autumn and was runner-up over hurdles at Taunton (2m3f) in his final run in 2025; returns after 141 days off but he needs watching in market back on the Flat."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "No More Bolero (GB)",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "60200-",
        "sire": "Protectionist",
        "dam_sire": "Selkirk",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "51.5",
        "model_pct": "13.4%",
        "fair_odds": "7.49",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-12.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Turned things around back over hurdles with a win at Ludlow (2m, good) in November but he was a well-held third in a small field at Sedgefield the following month; bit to prove again after that but conditions should be fine back in this sphere and he's well treated on his close call at Chester last autumn; not ruled out on his return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Bashful Boy",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "David Pipe",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "347544",
        "sire": "Magician",
        "dam_sire": "Include",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.4",
        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.59",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Veteran who hasn't won since 2023 but he's been in fair form on AW this spring including when fourth on Polytrack (2m) in his last two starts; should be in the mix again but he needs to find more to make a big impact; cheekpieces are removed and blinkers return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "The Craftymaster",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "431514",
        "sire": "Master Carpenter",
        "dam_sire": "Zafonic",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "49.6",
        "model_pct": "10.7%",
        "fair_odds": "9.39",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Got back on the scoresheet at Lingfield (2m, AW) last month and he ran to a similar level when fourth at Wolverhampton (1m6f) 11 days ago; on lower mark back on turf but he's struggled in his six runs in this sphere including three 2m handicaps; risks attached."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Peking Opera",
        "jockey": "Tom Queally",
        "trainer": "Gary & Josh Moore",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "0577/7",
        "sire": "Galileo",
        "dam_sire": "War Front",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "45.2",
        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.84",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Listed Flat winner for Aidan O'Brien; made a successful hurdle debut for this yard in early 2024 but it's been a struggle since then under both codes; has dropped a long way in the weights but he's hard to trust at the moment and others are preferred."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Lusaka (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Millie Wonnacott(5)",
        "trainer": "John & Rhys Flint",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "156-58",
        "sire": "The Last Lion",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "43.4",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.65",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Often a front-runner but he's a tactically versatile; six wins on turf (1m4f-1m6f) but he's not easy to predict and has been quiet on AW this winter; now only 1lb higher than for his last success but he still has stamina to prove at this trip and others are preferred."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Newbury",
    "time": "16:20",
    "race_name": "cityam.com Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "2m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Classical Allusion",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "1-2",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "65.1",
        "model_pct": "24.9%",
        "fair_odds": "4.01",
        "best_dec": "2.75",
        "edge": "-17.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Southwell maiden (1m4f, AW) in September on debut; second favourite to superstar hurdler Constitution Hill in Kempton novice (1m4f, AW) last month and chased him home 2l adrift, perhaps giving him more to think about than had widely been expected; not easy to pin down but 2m is plausible and his connections presumably like the look of his opening handicap mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Pole Star (GB)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "11650-",
        "sire": "Teofilo",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "62.8",
        "model_pct": "20.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.99",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-15.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "First five handicaps were all over about 1m6f, with two wins (good/soft) and two respectable efforts in valuable races in late summer; just 10-1 for 2m2f Cesarewitch at Newmarket on final outing, which did not work out but he has been gelded and could still have more to offer in this second season."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Maxident (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Kevin Philippart De Foy",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "4/421-",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Sadler's Wells",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "60.3",
        "model_pct": "15.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.36",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Goes well on testing ground, as he showed again when winning at Ffos Las (1m6f; stays 2m+) in September on latest start; 3lb rise today is far less concerning than his move away from soft or heavy ground."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Caprelo (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Hughie Morrison",
        "ts": "51",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "63102-",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "In The Wings",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "56.0",
        "model_pct": "10.5%",
        "fair_odds": "9.56",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Probably acts on any going but peak efforts were on AW at Kempton (2m) where he won in September and was runner-up in December; chance on that but needs to improve his turf form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Lavender Hill Mob",
        "jockey": "Mason Paetel(5)",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "1003-8",
        "sire": "Expert Eye",
        "dam_sire": "Daylami",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "55.3",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.14",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1m4f winner from the front (under Mason Paetel) at Newmarket last May who also scored with a prominent ride over hurdles at Cheltenham (2m5f) in November; had a bit to prove on AW (and over 2m on Flat) when always behind at Kempton three weeks ago but should be benefited from that run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Blazeon Five (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Alan King",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "4111-6",
        "sire": "Indian Haven",
        "dam_sire": "Proclamation",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "54.6",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.85",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended last year in storming form for 1m6f/2m hat-trick and not disgraced when never dangerous in January when last seen; peak efforts on softer than good but she's not dismissed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Francesco Baracca",
        "jockey": "Tyler Heard",
        "trainer": "Eve Johnson Houghton",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "91-148",
        "sire": "Golden Horn",
        "dam_sire": "Bated Breath",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-5",
        "score": "50.0",
        "model_pct": "6.0%",
        "fair_odds": "16.79",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has done best on AW, including three wins at Wolverhampton (1m6f/2m) in the last six months; well held at Lingfield two weeks ago but has a modest record there; has won twice on turf, latterly on good ground at Bath (1m6f) last June but none of his turf form matches today's mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.18",
        "best_dec": "67.00",
        "edge": "+2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "5-25; second in this race in 2023 and close third in the Chester Cup (2m2f, again on soft; favourite off 9lb higher than today) that May but absent for 758 days afterwards; while not disgraced on reappearance last October, he then tailed off on AW last month; major questions to answer regarding the ground and what he's currently capable of."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Finished well behind Law Court when last of ten on his Newbury debut (7f, good to firm) last August, but much better when second of 14 at Kempton (7f, Polytrack) the following month; off seven months since and has been gelded, but still high on list if taking another step forward."

        "spotlight": "\u00a316,000 yearling; half-sister to winners Pull The Rug (6f 2yo; RPR 70) and Oldbury Lad (7f AW; 58); dam Listed-placed 6f/7f winner (including 2yo/AW; 99), half-sister to useful 1m/1m2f winner Tobar Na Gaoise; yard 0-6 with 2yos this season and she could be one for further down the line."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "21,000gns yearling; third foal; closely related to 6f winner Candy (including 2yo Listed; RPR 104); dam unplaced 6f, sister to prolific 5f/6f winner Danzeno (including Group 3), half-sister to 5f Listed winner Demora; has a useful pedigree and interesting to see how she figures in market."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "17,000gns yearling, resold 7,000gns yearling; first foal; dam unraced close relative of 5f 2yo Group 3 winner Steel Bull, out of maiden sister to 5f/5.7f winner Marietta Robusti, half-sister to 5f 2yo Listed winner Three Sea Captains; yard 3-49 with 2yos last year and others look more likely."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fourth foal; half-sister to Italian 6f/6.5f winner Vento D'Irlande; dam French Listed-placed 5.5f 2yo winner (RPR 81), half-sister to Italian 7f Listed winner Ziggy's Dream, out of Listed-placed 1m1f/9.4f winner; has plenty of speed in pedigree and she needs checking in market on debut."

      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fairly useful form as a 2yo, including winning debut, but took his form to a new level with a runaway success at Southwell (7f, AW) on return 12 days ago; this is a stronger race but he is 6lb well in under the penalty and the money that came for him at Southwell strongly suggested he was thought to be smart; stall 1 is a potential query but lots to like otherwise."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Fort Rock (GB)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "99",

        "weight": "9-4",

        "model_pct": "12.5%",
        "fair_odds": "8.00",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had a nose to spare when making a winning debut last October (7f, AW) and won by a head back at Kempton three weeks later; it's hard to knock his attitude and this unbeaten colt commands plenty of respect on his seasonal, handicap and turf debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Stellar Sunrise (GB)",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "23115-",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "61.7",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.14",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark at the third attempt as a 2yo when seeing off 14 rivals at Glorious Goodwood (6f, good); improved for the step up to 7f when impressing in an 18-runner nursery at York's Ebor meeting (good to firm); only 5-1 for a Group 3 over C&D when last seen in October but he dropped away late on soft ground that may not have been ideal; could still have more to offer back on a sounder surface."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Astrazar (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "86",
        "form": "42411-",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Mehmas",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "59.5",
        "model_pct": "8.3%",
        "fair_odds": "12.01",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had become exposed over sprint trips but his form took off when upped to 7f+ on his final two runs as a 2yo, following his Ffos Las maiden win with a last-ditch success in a York sales race in October; gelded since; making his handicap debut on his eighth start but he looks on an appealing mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Crown Office (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "251-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "57.0",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.62",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a promising debut at Newmarket (6f, good to firm; strong form) last August; plenty went wrong at York on his second start and he showed his true colours when comfortably on top at the finish at Leicester when last seen in October; appeared to win that race in spite of the drop back to 6f and soft ground and he brings considerable potential to this handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Caballo Grande",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "31-1",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "56.5",
        "model_pct": "6.6%",
        "fair_odds": "15.20",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Inexperience evident on his 2yo debut (6f, good) and he has since made all for easy AW wins at Southwell (6f) and Wolverhampton (7f); the form of neither of those wins looks especially strong but he was in a different class to his rivals; this will be a far stiffer test of his credentials."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "May Angel (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "5156-",

        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 3,

        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.25",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ready winner of a 7f novice at Southwell on his second start; came up short in two Group 3 events afterwards (tried in a hood on second occasion); he has since undergone wind and gelding operations; hard pressed to describe him as well handicapped on what we have seen but the surgeries could unlock more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "rpr": "101",

        "fair_odds": "17.78",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Major eyecatcher on debut and he has improved with each subsequent run, winning a 1m maiden at Chelmsford and following up in a 7f handicap at Southwell three weeks ago; up 3lb against stronger opposition this time."
      },

        "fair_odds": "18.26",

        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended 2025 in fine form, completing a hat-trick when powering through the mud at Doncaster in November (6f); promising second behind Tamashal at Southwell on return three weeks ago; in deeper waters today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "fair_odds": "18.41",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Easy win on his debut (5f, good to firm) and showed fairly useful ability in five subsequent starts for Richard Hughes, including a C&D second when last seen in September (solid form); sold for 160,000gns the following month; begins this campaign up another 3lb; big personal best is required on his first run for a trainer who won this race in 2022 and 2023."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,

        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gelded after his three 2yo runs and proved a different proposition in two handicap runs this month, running away with a Class 5 at Southwell (1m) two weeks ago and following up at Wolverhampton (7f; Class 6) eight days ago; 6lb well in under his penalty but he is taking on a much higher calibre of opponent this afternoon."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "6f maiden win last summer; unplaced in good nurseries at York and Doncaster when last seen; gelded during his absence; needs to raise his game."
      },

        "spotlight": "Won twice for Jack Channon; successful stable debut at Southwell last month and ran another solid race when third behind two reopposing rivals at Southwell three weeks ago; this race is tougher."
      },

        "cd": "",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Raced over 6f as a 2yo, winning a Windsor novice by daylight last June and third in Listed race here three weeks later; soft ground excuses his poor run when last seen; improvement required for the longer trip and/or a gelding operation if he is to win today."
      }

        "spotlight": "Off the mark when landing a novice over C&D in October, but a bit disappointing when only fourth of six having been sent off odds-on for last month's Kempton return (1m, Polytrack); perhaps the run was just needed and the return here is a positive on handicap debut."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent in maiden/novices on the AW at the start of her career (22221) and has since shown some good form in turf handicaps, including in headgear; off six months, but has gone well fresh before; considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Modest form in two turf runs last summer, but a complete contrast when bolting up by 5l in a Lingfield maiden (1m, Polytrack) four weeks ago (runner-up has won since); this is likely to be harder on handicap debut, but she is clearly progressive."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bolted up from the front in a Lingfield novice (7.6f, good) last August; ran with credit when third of eight on her return from five months off at Southwell (7f, Tapeta) 12 days ago, but probably needs more back up in trip."
      },

        "rank": 5,

        "spotlight": "2-2 in handicaps last year including at Chelmsford (1m, Polytrack); far from disgraced when sixth of 18 in a Saint-Cloud Listed event (1m, heavy) on her final outing and respected if ready to go after 159 days off."
      }
