  {
    "course": "Bath",
    "time": "17:20",
    "race_name": "MJ Church Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "5f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Hunky Dory",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Jack Morland",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "21-551",
        "sire": "Pinatubo",
        "dam_sire": "Smart Strike",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "61.0",
        "model_pct": "23.2%",
        "fair_odds": "4.31",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-11.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Southwell for Mick Appleby in December and he made it 2-4 in cheekpieces with a dominant display at Wolverhampton (6f, AW) last week; record of 0-7 on turf but he ran well in big-field handicap at York last summer and he's a major player if he can transfer his progress back to this sphere; respected under a penalty."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Strike (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Jonathan Portman",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "06263-",
        "sire": "Lethal Force",
        "dam_sire": "Groom Dancer",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "55.8",
        "model_pct": "12.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.20",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four-time turf winner but his last success was in July 2024; well handicapped on his best form last season but he's not easy to predict and was well held on his seasonal return last April; some reservations."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Mr Lightside",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "-07534",
        "sire": "Earthlight",
        "dam_sire": "War Front",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "53.6",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.83",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both wins were on turf in 2024 but he's well treated on old form and has run respectably on Tapeta (5f/6f) in last two starts; can make the running and it wouldn't be a surprise if he made a bold bid back in this sphere."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Jax Edge (GB)",
        "jockey": "Gina Mangan",
        "trainer": "Christopher Mason",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "21510-",
        "sire": "Cable Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "53.2",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.42",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six-time turf winner who has a good record at Bath and is only 2lb higher than for her win here (5f, heavy) last autumn; returns after 165 days off but she went close on her reappearance last season and that was on good to firm at Chepstow (6f); in the mix."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Moe's Legacy",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "Ronald Harris",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "365-13",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Frozen Power",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "53.2",
        "model_pct": "8.7%",
        "fair_odds": "11.44",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Triple C&D winner who scored on her reappearance at Wolverhampton last month and was a close third there 18 days ago; on same mark as for that last run and she's respected back at this track; handles most ground but her turf wins have been on good to firm/firm."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Mumayaz",
        "jockey": "Kieren Fox",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "574624",
        "sire": "Tamayuz",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.41",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Hold-up performer who won four times last year including off 4lb higher at Brighton (7f, good to firm); two solid efforts on AW since rejoining Tony Carroll last month and he could be a big factor if he gets the breaks back on turf; tongue-tie and blinkers are removed but he has won without headgear."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Toolatetonegotiate",
        "jockey": "Millie Wonnacott(5)",
        "trainer": "Daisy Hitchins",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "-51334",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Delegator",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "50.7",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.58",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All three wins have been on AW and she ran right up to her best when a close fourth at Wolverhampton (5f) last month; on same mark here but she's 0-9 on turf and this is highly competitive back in this sphere; others are more persuasive."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Justcallmepete",
        "jockey": "Dougie Costello",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "1-4545",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Efisio",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "50.3",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.50",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Nine-time AW winner who won three in a row during the winter and was a creditable fifth in Class 3 at Lingfield (6f, Polytrack) two weeks ago; record of 1-21 on turf but he's on a lower mark in this sphere and he had a close call at Windsor last autumn; dangerous."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Safari Dream",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Rod Millman",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "2045-3",
        "sire": "Bungle Inthejungle",
        "dam_sire": "Kyllachy",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.75",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five of his six wins (5f/6f) have been on turf but he returned after five months off with a fair third at Kempton (7f) three weeks ago; should benefit from that run and he has possibilities on this drop back in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Connie's Rose (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Grace Harris",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "21856-",
        "sire": "Adaay",
        "dam_sire": "Harbour Watch",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.21",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All ten wins have been on turf and latest was at Chepstow last September; handles most ground but she ended last season on a low note and she didn't shine on her reappearance last spring; market should guide after 179 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Aces Wild (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Taryn Langley(5)",
        "trainer": "Adrian Wintle",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "42127-",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "46.0",
        "model_pct": "3.6%",
        "fair_odds": "28.11",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Chester last summer but that was off 5lb lower and he was never involved here (5f. good to firm) in his final run last season; usually seen at a lower level and he has some work to do after 199 days off; one of two runners for yard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Arabian Cobra (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Adrian Wintle",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "13360-",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Dandy Man",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "46.0",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.33",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended last season with a heavy defeat in the Ayr Bronze Cup but he did well for Hugo Palmer last summer including a brave win off this mark at Chester (6f, good); returns in new headgear for new yard but he went close on his reappearance last term and he needs watching in market."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Newbury",
    "time": "17:25",
    "race_name": "Dubai Duty Free Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Cindy Lou Who",
        "jockey": "William Carson",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "116",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "3113-2",
        "sire": "Zoustar",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "61.1",
        "model_pct": "13.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.29",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-16.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made giant strides for Tony Carroll last season, winning four times (three of them at Bath); confirmed her affinity for Bath, as well as the fact that she had done well over the winter, when short-headed in a Bath Listed race on Easter Sunday (5f, good); 15lb well in on this return to handicap company; obvious chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Juan Les Pins",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "98",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "002121",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Darshaan",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "57.8",
        "model_pct": "10.0%",
        "fair_odds": "9.98",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He had dropped a long way in the weights prior to popping up at Newcastle (5f) last month; ran well at Doncaster ten days later and back on the scoresheet with a Thirsk win last week (6f, good); won that apprentice race (no penalty today) last time with more authority than the winning margin might suggest but he is up in class today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Lakers",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Kevin Philippart De Foy",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "71-339",
        "sire": "Pinatubo",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "55.3",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.74",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unexposed at 6f; this mark is in range judged on his two placed efforts this winter; failed to fire on Good Friday but he received a kick before the start which won't have helped; no surprise to see him bounce back."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Arctic Thunder (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "86",
        "form": "70434-",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 16,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "54.9",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.23",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "String of runs last summer (6f-7f) suggested he was ahead of his mark but he often ran into trouble and/or got going too late; no surprise at all were he to take this back from a break but he is not one for the faint of heart."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Addison Grey (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Clive Cox",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "71310-",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Lethal Force",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "53.9",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.66",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-10.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Managed only a midfield finish in the Portland Handicap (5.6f, good) when last seen in September but he was favourite for that prestigious event having won well at Newmarket on penultimate start; still has potential after just six starts, three of which have resulted in 6f wins; looks the type to be contesting major sprint handicaps this summer but stall 1 is a slight query on his return (best pace looks middle to high); gelded since last seen."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Daring Legend (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tyler Heard",
        "trainer": "Mark Pattinson",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "9160-2",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "53.6",
        "model_pct": "6.6%",
        "fair_odds": "15.07",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+3.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "40-1 for his stable debut at Kempton (6f, AW) last month but he ran a cracker for second, beaten a nose; up in grade today but not out of it on last year's turf best."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Wheels Of Fire",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "776-01",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Deportivo",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "6.6%",
        "fair_odds": "15.20",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-6.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gelded after his 3yo campaign; down the field at Newcastle on return but much more like it when skipping clear in the closing stages at Musselburgh 13 days ago (5f, soft; edged left under pressure); return to 6f no problem but an 8lb rise in the weights might be."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Change Sings",
        "jockey": "George Downing",
        "trainer": "Eve Johnson Houghton",
        "ts": "103",
        "rpr": "109",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "4670-3",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Indian Ridge",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "52.7",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.49",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Getting on for two years since his last win but he was a good second in this race last year (off 2lb higher mark) and he returned to action with a promising third at Kempton three weeks ago; solid contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Photosynthesis (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Harry Davies",
        "trainer": "Peter Chapple-Hyam",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "3971-0",
        "sire": "Aclaim",
        "dam_sire": "Camacho",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "52.3",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "17.01",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Disappointing at Newcastle in January; had earlier dug deep to win a Newmarket handicap (6f, good) on his final 4yo outing; third in this race 12 months ago and can't be discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Hucklesbrook (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jack Mitchell",
        "trainer": "Roger Teal",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "91",
        "form": "08458-",
        "sire": "Aclaim",
        "dam_sire": "Captain Rio",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "52.3",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "17.06",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a couple of useful 6f 3yo handicaps in the first half of 2025; no progress since but he is edging back down the weights; returns from four months off and he will need to be at his best."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Roach Power (IRE)",
        "jockey": "J F Egan",
        "trainer": "Michael Wigham",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "11710-",
        "sire": "Ribchester",
        "dam_sire": "Keltos",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "50.5",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.31",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Enjoyed a revival in the second half of 2025, winning five 5f handicaps on good ground or slower; no show over 6f when last seen in November and he returns to action off a tough mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Montezin (GB)",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Antony Brittain",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "221-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "8-6",
        "score": "49.0",
        "model_pct": "4.2%",
        "fair_odds": "23.51",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "320,000euros yearling but didn't reach the track for Godolphin and sold for 16,000gns in January 2025; three promising runs on AW in late 2025, second at Wolverhampton and Newcastle (both 5f) before justifying odds-on favouritism at Newcastle when upped to 6f in November; could have been found easier opportunities for his handicap debut and this is his trainer's first runner at Newbury; those factors both heighten interest in this unexposed 4yo."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Mirabeau",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Dominic Ffrench Davis",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "91",
        "form": "6750-0",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Mastercraftsman",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "48.5",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "24.68",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Campaigned over as far as 10.3f and this will be his first 6f run since his 2yo debut; well beaten in the Lincoln on his reappearance (1m, good to soft); dangerous mark judged on best 2025 effort (7f, good to soft); trip is a query but Oisin Murphy a notable booking."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Brian",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "J S Moore",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "5297-0",
        "sire": "Shaman",
        "dam_sire": "New Approach",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "47.0",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.65",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "-0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Heavy defeats on his last three starts, including his Kempton reappearance three weeks ago; he's on a fair mark on the pick of his efforts though and this track does seem to suit him well; Tom Marquand is a notable booking for the stable (his nine rides for Stan Moore have yielded two wins, a second, three thirds and two fourths); lively outsider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "Gweedore",
        "jockey": "William Pyle(3)",
        "trainer": "Katie Scott",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "7781-7",
        "sire": "Epaulette",
        "dam_sire": "Choisir",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "46.9",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.91",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He has been a fine advertisement for Katie Scott, winning 13 races over 7f and 1m; 0-6 at this trip but he was beaten less than one length in the 2023 Ayr Gold Cup; recent Musselburgh return should have blown away the cobwebs but others are still more appealing for win purposes."
      },
      {
        "rank": 16,
        "horse": "Brosay",
        "jockey": "Thomas Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Charlie Pike",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "1140-0",
        "sire": "Tasleet",
        "dam_sire": "Ivawood",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "44.8",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "35.43",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "6f wins at Windsor and Ascot last summer and he's of interest on the latter effort; 33-1 and offered little in a 5f handicap at Newcastle four weeks ago; should be sharper today but others bring more compelling claims."
      }
    ]
  },

      {

        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Handy throughout and won by 1.5l over 1m at Bath 12 days ago; no good thing to defy a penalty when she's anything but consistent and drawn in 12."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Desiderata",
        "jockey": "Finley Marsh",
        "trainer": "Thomas Faulkner",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "66",

        "fair_odds": "10.99",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record of 2-21; arrives in form after a win here over 8.6f and a close third over 1m2f at Lingfield; 3lb higher than for those two runs but should be on the scene."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Bossy Parker",
        "jockey": "Zak Wheatley(3)",
        "trainer": "Tony Culhane & Stella Barclay",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "50",
        "form": "553251",

        "stall": 5,

        "score": "49.4",
        "model_pct": "8.1%",
        "fair_odds": "12.30",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His third win here when holding on grimly last month (8.6f), ending a two-year losing streak; only 2lb higher but he wouldn't be an obvious one to follow up and has never raced over quite this far."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Arlecchino's Rex",
        "jockey": "Neil Callan",
        "trainer": "Mark Usher",
        "ts": "53",

        "fair_odds": "13.16",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beat Al Shabab over C&D in March and has continued to run well off this 3lb higher mark; considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Balqaa",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Tony Culhane & Stella Barclay",
        "ts": "40",
        "rpr": "63",

        "fair_odds": "16.43",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "It was a classified race she won over C&D last month but this mark isn't beyond her and a slow start was no help at Southwell."
      },
      {

        "ts": "54",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No wins in 17 but after racing over further he hit the frame over C&D 11 days ago; could nick a race sooner or later off this low a mark."
      },

        "spotlight": "Dual winner in Germany; has hurtled down the ratings in Britain for good reason but having first run for Mark Loughnane when showing more here 18 days ago (8.6f; 5-1); he faded late on after being up there; could be on the verge of turning a corner."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Bath",
    "time": "17:52",
    "race_name": "Wight Event Toilets Hire Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "5f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Campenaerts (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Jonathan Portman",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "44121-",
        "sire": "Sergei Prokofiev",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "54.9",
        "model_pct": "12.9%",
        "fair_odds": "7.75",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended his time with Archie Watson in good form, winning a couple of small-field 5f nurseries; sold for 21,000gns in October; in deeper waters for his seasonal/stable debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Red Snapper (GB)",
        "jockey": "Laura Coughlan(3)",
        "trainer": "Kathy Turner",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "95521-",
        "sire": "Land Force",
        "dam_sire": "Estidhkaar",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "53.3",
        "model_pct": "10.4%",
        "fair_odds": "9.64",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+4.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close second over C&D in September (good to firm) before digging deep to win a 5f nursery back here three weeks later (heavy); up in class for his return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Noble Vow (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Alec Voikhansky",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "3432-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Kheleyf",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "53.0",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.10",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Steady progress with each of his four 2yo runs, beaten a nose a Wolverhampton in October (6f); could progress further now handicapping."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Concert",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "4036-4",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "51.8",
        "model_pct": "8.3%",
        "fair_odds": "12.04",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't really progress for William Haggas after winning a 6f Yarmouth maiden on her second start; late headway into fourth on her stable debut at Wolverhampton last month; better can be expected back up in trip today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Blue Orbit",
        "jockey": "Jack Doughty",
        "trainer": "Dr Richard Newland & Jamie Insole",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "1660-2",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "8.1%",
        "fair_odds": "12.35",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Returned from seven months off (gelded during his absence) with a dead-heat for second at Wolverhampton last month (6f); his win came on good to firm and this extended 5f should suit; not discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Starmade (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jamie Spencer",
        "trainer": "Ed Dunlop",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "321-",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Zebedee",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "7.7%",
        "fair_odds": "13.00",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved with each of his three runs last autumn, getting off the mark when switched to AW at Newcastle in October (5f); his opening mark looks a tough one but he is at least unexposed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Marcellinus (GB)",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "Tom Dascombe",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "332-",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "50.6",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.20",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Recorded an RPR of 71 in each of his three 2yo runs; gelded during his absence; looks on a tough opening mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Alvin",
        "jockey": "Darragh Keenan",
        "trainer": "George Scott",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "6-4183",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Zoffany",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "49.3",
        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.13",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-13.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ready winner of a 5f novice at Wolverhampton in February; plenty went wrong on his handicap debut at Southwell and it was a mighty effort when a close third at Lingfield on Good Friday (6f) given he was hampered at the start, unsettled as a result and then forced extremely wide throughout; surely well handicapped and displayed promise on good to firm on debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Quantum Power (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Molly Keegan-Price(7)",
        "trainer": "Tom Clover",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "62104-",
        "sire": "Supremacy",
        "dam_sire": "The Last Lion",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "49.2",
        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.21",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His maiden win came on soft ground and he is untried on faster than good; fourth to Akabusi when last seen in October suggests he's vulnerable, and he has an inexperienced apprentice booked."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Romeo Montague (GB)",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "Richard Spencer",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "7317-5",
        "sire": "Sergei Prokofiev",
        "dam_sire": "Dandy Man",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "48.8",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.28",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Narrow winner of a 6f AW maiden last September; hasn't lived up to market billing in two handicap runs; should do better at some point but others appeal more today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Wedonttelllies (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Donagh Murphy(7)",
        "trainer": "Richard Hughes",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "8315-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Singspiel",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "48.6",
        "model_pct": "5.3%",
        "fair_odds": "18.89",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-9.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He beat 13 rivals when winning a Kempton novice (7f) last September; beaten favourite but ran creditably on his nursery debut at Newmarket when last seen in October; gelded since; drops in trip for his reappearance and with a good 7lb claimer enlisted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Akabusi",
        "jockey": "Kyle McHugh(7)",
        "trainer": "Mike Murphy",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "522-94",
        "sire": "Mohaather",
        "dam_sire": "Alhaarth",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "47.0",
        "model_pct": "4.2%",
        "fair_odds": "23.63",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Drawn widest when a close fourth at Lingfield on Good Friday but still enjoyed a much better trip than third-placed Alvin; may struggle to reverse those placings."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Coyy (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Charles Bishop",
        "trainer": "Eve Johnson Houghton",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "48358-",
        "sire": "Far Above",
        "dam_sire": "Lethal Force",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "45.5",
        "model_pct": "3.4%",
        "fair_odds": "29.24",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise on turf last spring; returned from a four-month break with two disappointing efforts in nurseries in the autumn; had a wind operation since last in action and still has time to deliver on that early promise."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Grey Horizon",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "52",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "316256",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Outstrip",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "44.2",
        "model_pct": "2.9%",
        "fair_odds": "35.02",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four AW wins for this yard in the winter; made a bold bid from the front at Lingfield on Good Friday before weakening into sixth; his two best turf runs came on soft and good."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "Carefree Dream (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ashley Lewis(5)",
        "trainer": "J S Moore",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "37210-",
        "sire": "Dream Ahead",
        "dam_sire": "Byron",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "44.0",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "36.23",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won small-field 5f handicap on soft ground here last September; stiff task at Goodwood 11 days later; absent since and looks on a tough mark."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Bath",
    "time": "18:22",
    "race_name": "Unibet Supports Bath Racecourse Restricted Maiden Stakes (Bands C/D) (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Ourbren",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "J S Moore",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "5936-5",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Temple City",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "51.5",
        "model_pct": "25.5%",
        "fair_odds": "3.92",
        "best_dec": "1.22",
        "edge": "-62.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six-race maiden but she finished placed in a fillies' Listed race at Newbury (7f, soft) in the autumn and wasn't beaten far in a conditions event at Kempton (1m, AW) on her return last month; sets a useful standard back in calmer waters and she should be hard to beat."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Three No Trumps",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",
        "trainer": "Ed Dunlop",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3-5",
        "sire": "Make Believe",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "20.9%",
        "fair_odds": "4.77",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Belied his 100-1 odds with keeping-on third of 13 at Kempton (1m, AW) in sole 2yo start; well held on reappearance at Doncaster (1m2f, good to soft) last month but that was a useful maiden and he's clear second-best on the figures in this line-up; in the mix back in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Malakai Kite",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Ronald Harris",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "46.5",
        "model_pct": "14.9%",
        "fair_odds": "6.71",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+8.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3,500euros foal, 7,000euros yearling, 11,000gns breeze-up 2yo; fourth foal; dam placed 1m2f 2yo (RPR 73), closely related to Australian 1m2f Group 3 winner Mask Of Time, out of 14.5f winning half-sister to 1,000 Guineas winner Miss France; this is a tough starting point and he's probably best watched."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Miss Mambo",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "Gay Kelleway",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "40-7",
        "sire": "Elzaam",
        "dam_sire": "Whipper",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "44.6",
        "model_pct": "12.1%",
        "fair_odds": "8.27",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No progress in her three runs at up to 1m and has a best RPR of 55; minor handicaps will be more suitable after this and she's best watched."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ocean Force",
        "jockey": "Tom Queally",
        "trainer": "Gary & Josh Moore",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "49",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "7",
        "sire": "El Kabeir",
        "dam_sire": "Mr Greeley",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "43.2",
        "model_pct": "10.4%",
        "fair_odds": "9.61",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "150-1 and he finished a well-held seventh of 11 on Kempton debut (1m, AW) last week; opposable."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Tough Date",
        "jockey": "George Bass",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "63",
        "sire": "Gregorian",
        "dam_sire": "Australia",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "42.9",
        "model_pct": "10.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.89",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-8.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beaten a long way on 1m Southwell debut last month but he showed promise when third of nine over same C&D nine days later; this is a much tougher assignment but he has a good pedigree and is open to more progress on this switch to turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Lamlash (GB)",
        "jockey": "Taylor Fisher",
        "trainer": "Joe Tickle",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "26",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "80-",
        "sire": "Massaat",
        "dam_sire": "Garswood",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "38.1",
        "model_pct": "6.0%",
        "fair_odds": "16.67",
        "best_dec": "126.00",
        "edge": "+5.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Failed to beat a rival in two Flat maidens (1m, AW/good) for Stan Moore in the autumn and was pulled up on his stable/hurdle debut in December."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Bath",
    "time": "18:52",

    "type": "flat",

    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "fair_odds": "3.59",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Back from seven months off (also gelded) with a promising second of nine on his handicap debut at Kempton (1m) last month; up 1lb but he can go well again with further progress on the cards."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Chapman's Peak (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jamie Spencer",
        "trainer": "Ed Dunlop",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "99411-",

        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.1",
        "model_pct": "11.5%",
        "fair_odds": "8.67",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Upwardly-mobile juvenile who bagged 7f/1m nurseries at Kempton in October; remains on a workable mark despite a 4lb rise and rates a player in his hat-trick bid."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Tewkesbury",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "Simon & Ed Crisford",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "424-28",
        "sire": "Ghaiyyath",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "10.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.94",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Took a step forward on his return when second at Chelmsford (1m) but failed to build on it when eighth of nine in 1m Southwell handicap 15 days ago; slowly away there and could still do better on his first run on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Halla Bil Zain",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Grace Harris",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "6232-0",

        "dam_sire": "Speightstown",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "10.0%",
        "fair_odds": "10.03",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+6.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed on four runs (7f/1m) for Owen Burrows at 2yrs; changed hands for 25,000gns and gelded but failed to beat a rival on his stable debut in a 7f Doncaster novice 19 days ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Trio (GB)",
        "jockey": "Charles Bishop",
        "trainer": "Eve Johnson Houghton",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "6613-",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "New Approach",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "50.2",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.35",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Got off the mark at the third attempt in 1m Leicester maiden in October and backed it up with a good third of six in 1m1f Newmarket nursery following month; she needs considering on her seasonal return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Foothold (IRE)",

        "trainer": "Marcus Tregoning",

        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "49.6",

        "fair_odds": "12.36",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Failed to build on earlier promise on his handicap debut when a keen-going fifth of six at Lingfield (1m) 78 days ago; hood goes on now after a break and he remains with potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Crafty Blue (IRE)",

        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "28",
